# API Contracts: Frontend‚ÄìBackend Integration

**Generated by**: `/speckit.plan`
**Date**: 2026-04-13
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md) | [research.md](../research.md)

All endpoints are under `NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL` (HTTP/REST via API Gateway v2).
WebSocket endpoint is `NEXT_PUBLIC_WS_URL` (API Gateway WebSocket).

---

## HTTP Endpoints

### POST /v1/jobs ‚Äî Create or retrieve a video download job

**Request**
```json
{
  "tiktokUrl": "https://www.tiktok.com/@user/video/123456789",
  "format": "mp4"
}
```
`format`: `"mp4"` | `"mp3"`. Defaults to `"mp4"`.

**Response ‚Äî HTTP 201 (cache miss, job enqueued)**
```json
{
  "jobId": "01HWABCDEF1234567890",
  "status": "pending"
}
```

**Response ‚Äî HTTP 200 (cache hit, artifact already exists)**
```json
{
  "jobId": "01HWABCDEF1234567890",
  "status": "ready",
  "downloadUrl": "https://trimtok-bucket.s3.amazonaws.com/mp4/videoId/jobId.mp4?X-Amz-Signature=..."
}
```
`downloadUrl` is a presigned S3 URL valid for 3600 seconds.

> **Note**: This is a **breaking change from the current backend** (D4 in research.md). Currently the cache-hit path returns `{ status, downloadUrl }` without `jobId`. The `jobId` field is being added to enable subsequent trim/gif/mp3 operations.

**Response ‚Äî HTTP 400 (validation error)**
```json
{ "error": { "code": "VALIDATION_ERROR", "details": [...] } }
```

**Response ‚Äî HTTP 422 (invalid TikTok URL)**
```json
{ "error": { "code": "INVALID_URL", "message": "Not a valid TikTok URL" } }
```

**Response ‚Äî HTTP 429 (rate limit exceeded)**
```json
{ "error": { "code": "RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED" } }
```
Header: `Retry-After: 60`

---

### GET /v1/jobs/:jobId ‚Äî Get full job details with presigned download URL

**Response ‚Äî HTTP 200**
```json
{
  "jobId": "01HWABCDEF1234567890",
  "status": "ready",
  "format": "mp4",
  "title": "Funny TikTok video",
  "duration": 45,
  "thumbnailUrl": "https://p16-sign.tiktokcdn.com/...",
  "trimStart": null,
  "trimEnd": null,
  "downloadUrl": "https://trimtok-bucket.s3.amazonaws.com/mp4/videoId/jobId.mp4?X-Amz-Signature=...",
  "errorMessage": null,
  "createdAt": "2026-04-13T10:00:00.000Z",
  "updatedAt": "2026-04-13T10:00:45.000Z"
}
```
`downloadUrl` is `null` when job is not yet in a terminal-with-artifact status, or when the S3 object no longer exists.

**Response ‚Äî HTTP 404**
```json
{ "error": { "code": "JOB_NOT_FOUND", "message": "Job not found" } }
```

---

### POST /v1/jobs/:jobId/trim ‚Äî Request a trimmed segment

**Request**
```json
{
  "trimStart": 5.0,
  "trimEnd": 30.5
}
```
Both values are in **seconds** (floating point). `trimStart ‚â• 0`, `trimEnd > 0`.

**Response ‚Äî HTTP 200 (cache hit)**
```json
{
  "status": "trimmed",
  "downloadUrl": "https://trimtok-bucket.s3.amazonaws.com/mp4/videoId/jobId.mp4?..."
}
```

**Response ‚Äî HTTP 202 (enqueued for processing)**
```json
{ "status": "trimming" }
```
Frontend must wait for the WS notification `status: "trimmed"` and then call `GET /v1/jobs/:jobId` to retrieve the presigned URL.

**Response ‚Äî HTTP 404** ‚Äî Job not found
**Response ‚Äî HTTP 409** ‚Äî Job not in a trimmable state

---

### POST /v1/jobs/:jobId/gif ‚Äî Request a GIF (H.264 silent MP4) from a segment

**Request**
```json
{
  "trimStart": 0.0,
  "trimEnd": 6.0
}
```
Both fields are optional. Omitting both creates a GIF from the full video.

**Response ‚Äî HTTP 200 (cache hit)**
```json
{
  "status": "gif_created",
  "downloadUrl": "https://trimtok-bucket.s3.amazonaws.com/gifs/videoId/jobId.mp4?..."
}
```

**Response ‚Äî HTTP 202 (enqueued)**
```json
{ "status": "creating_gif" }
```
Frontend must wait for WS `status: "gif_created"` then call `GET /v1/jobs/:jobId`.

**Response ‚Äî HTTP 404** ‚Äî Job not found
**Response ‚Äî HTTP 409** ‚Äî Job not in a valid state for GIF creation

---

### POST /v1/jobs/:jobId/mp3 ‚Äî Request an MP3 extraction

**Request**
```json
{
  "trimStart": 5.0,
  "trimEnd": 30.5
}
```
Both fields are optional. Omitting both extracts audio from the full video.

**Response ‚Äî HTTP 200 (cache hit)**
```json
{
  "status": "mp3_ready",
  "downloadUrl": "https://trimtok-bucket.s3.amazonaws.com/mp3/videoId/jobId.mp3?..."
}
```

**Response ‚Äî HTTP 202 (enqueued)**
```json
{ "status": "creating_mp3" }
```
Frontend must wait for WS `status: "mp3_ready"` then call `GET /v1/jobs/:jobId`.

**Response ‚Äî HTTP 404** ‚Äî Job not found
**Response ‚Äî HTTP 409** ‚Äî Job not in a valid state for MP3 extraction

---

## WebSocket Protocol

**Endpoint**: `NEXT_PUBLIC_WS_URL` (e.g. `wss://x532bxsc3h.execute-api.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/$default`)
**API Gateway routes**: `$connect`, `$disconnect`, `subscribe`

### Subscribe (client ‚Üí server)

After the WS connection opens, the client MUST send this message to start receiving job notifications:

```json
{ "action": "subscribe", "jobId": "01HWABCDEF1234567890" }
```

### Subscribe confirmation (server ‚Üí client)

```json
{
  "type": "subscribed",
  "jobId": "01HWABCDEF1234567890",
  "currentStatus": "ready"
}
```
`currentStatus` is the job's current status at subscribe time, or `null` if the job is not found. The frontend MUST handle a non-null `currentStatus` as if it were a `job_update` message ‚Äî the job may have already reached a terminal status before the WS connected.

### Job update notification (server ‚Üí client)

Sent by all 4 workers (`download-worker`, `trim-worker`, `gif-worker`, `mp3-worker`) via `NotifyJobUpdateUseCase` after any status change.

```json
{
  "type": "job_update",
  "jobId": "01HWABCDEF1234567890",
  "status": "ready",
  "title": "Funny TikTok video",
  "duration": 45,
  "thumbnailUrl": "https://p16-sign.tiktokcdn.com/...",
  "updatedAt": "2026-04-13T10:00:45.000Z",
  "s3Key": "mp4/videoId/jobId.mp4",
  "errorMessage": null
}
```
`s3Key` is present **only** when `status` is one of: `ready`, `trimmed`, `gif_created`, `mp3_ready`.
`errorMessage` is present **only** when `status` is `error`.
`title`, `duration`, `thumbnailUrl` may be `null`/absent for non-download statuses.

> **Important**: The WS message includes `s3Key`, not a presigned `downloadUrl`. The frontend MUST call `GET /v1/jobs/:jobId` after receiving a terminal-with-artifact status to obtain the presigned URL.

### Job status transitions

```
pending ‚Üí downloading ‚Üí ready               (download flow)
ready ‚Üí trimming ‚Üí trimmed                  (trim flow)
ready ‚Üí creating_gif ‚Üí gif_created          (gif flow)
ready ‚Üí creating_mp3 ‚Üí mp3_ready            (mp3 flow)
* ‚Üí error                                   (any flow, on failure)
```

---

## Error Envelope (all HTTP endpoints)

```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "ERROR_CODE",
    "message": "Human-readable description",
    "details": [...]
  }
}
```
`details` is only present for `VALIDATION_ERROR`. `message` may be absent for some codes.

| Code | HTTP Status | Meaning |
|------|-------------|---------|
| `VALIDATION_ERROR` | 400 | Schema validation failed |
| `INVALID_URL` | 422 | Not a valid TikTok URL |
| `RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED` | 429 | 10 req/min per IP exceeded |
| `JOB_NOT_FOUND` | 404 | jobId does not exist |
| `JOB_CONFLICT` | 409 | Job not in required state for the operation |
